frame_lifetime: The adapter workspace owns generation-stable topology and asset pointers, rebuilds matrices and material snapshots before each synchronous preflight, remains resident through all eight interleaved commits, and restores captured texture IDs only at segments 1, 2, and 5.
invalidation_manifest: asset owner generation, loaded-file identity, data pointer, asset ID, size, or owner generation changes
segment identity, link, callback, display-link order, or visibility flags change
DObj parent/child/sibling, display list, MObj, flags, XObj count/kind, owner, depth, or binding changes
camera projection or any of 42 composed matrices changes: recompute every frame; never cache near-plane results
any live MObj material, texture selector, color, alpha, scale, scroll, palette, or image input changes: rebuild all four snapshots
callback segment/order mismatch: fail closed; never restore texture IDs at a different seam

task26_overlap.consume: immutable generated control fields plus the ordered live operand block above
task26_overlap.forbid: a second topology cache, cached camera/near results, a generic runtime scanner, or post-GX fallback
task26_overlap.retain_current: generation/stamp admission, all per-frame matrices and near-plane computation, exact material rebuild, callback restoration, and pre-GX fail-closed validation

task26_segment0_program.admission: execute only after the existing generation/stamp topology admission has populated sNdsNativeStageValidationCache

prepared_dense_cache.disposition: reuse the Task-14 prepared_dense_offsets/indices; do not emit a second schedule

retained_live_seams: per-frame composed-matrix transforms and near-plane classification
one shared traversal/stats/epoch-mask transaction across all eight segments

transitive_inputs.disposition: recompute the live camera and dynamic DObj operands every frame; retain only generation-bound rigid world matrices
transitive_inputs.name: camera_and_dobj_matrix_operands

transitive_inputs.disposition: retain the current exact state, texture resolver, color, alpha, and configuration helpers in Task 26
transitive_inputs.name: material_color_alpha_texture_and_resolver_state

transitive_inputs.disposition: validate before GX and preserve exact segment and texture-ID restoration order
transitive_inputs.name: visibility_phase_and_callback_restoration
